profileUrl.title: Linktree profile URL
profileUrl.description: The full Linktree profile URL whose Daraz affiliate links should be scraped.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: How many Daraz links to resolve in parallel. Each request uses a fresh residential proxy IP, so higher values are faster and spread load across more IPs. Too high can exhaust the Nepal residential pool and raise the blocked/invalid rate.
